zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ashton於1473年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Ashton33歲，母親Elizabeth Staveley32歲。她於1486年5月與Sir William Booth在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ashton于1473年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Ashton33岁，母亲Elizabeth Staveley32岁。她于1486年5月与Sir William Booth在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ashton was born in 1473, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Ashton, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Staveley, was 32. She married Sir William Booth in May 1486, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1519, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ashton(이)가 1473년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Ashton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Staveley(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1486년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir William Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ashton родилась в 1473 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Ashton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Staveley, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Booth май 1486 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1519 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
